categories.label: Triage
categories.description: Patient registration, first orders, ongoing charting & discharge

items.label: Call 7574 ED admitting and ask to create account
Move pt to tracking shell from "FHM MCH pre-reg" to room chosen
Grab specimen printer if need specimens
Focused assessment r/t reason for coming in
Order: Notification to admitting OB "admit to Obs, room xzy"
Papers: d/c education paper signed (give yellow page to patient)
Discharge education: "pt to keep all current appointments"
Order: Notification to admitting OB "Discharged home, undelivered, please create pre-reg account for when she returns"
Stickered FHR paper to manila and place in storage near SL
Fileclip papers (prenatals, signed documents, facesheet, charges) and place in medical records bin
Strip room, call EVS or text to clean 805-503-0871
Move pt to tracking shell from FHM MCH pre-reg
Call ED admitting if no account
Print facesheet, wristband, stickers if needed
OB triage if first visit, otherwise document events: "no changes to OB health, endorses +FM, no LOF, VB, or UC"

categories.label: Induction / Labor
categories.description: Room prep, first hour care & initial documentation

items.label: Robe / vaginal delivery pack / orange bag in crib
Bring linens for support person & organize linen closet
Bring delivery meds & syringe / needles to room (locked box - 6686)
Print, label & scan labs, then send to lab ("specimen collection" to scan)
Notification to admitting OB: "Admit to Labor, room xyz, Dr xyz"
POC — initiate and document in plan
Review MFM binder to see if pt is in it
Grab specimen printer and print labs
Review charge sheet: qualifies for accommodation codes?

categories.label: Ongoing Labor
categories.description: Continuing care throughout labor — checks, charting & timing
categories.infoPanel: **Frequencies:** FHR q30min (q15m pushing) · Pitocin: FHT q15min & Oxy checklist q30min · VS per protocol

items.label: Robe / vaginal delivery pack / orange bag in crib?
Bring delivery meds & syringe / needles to room (box - 6686)
Paper forms (Blood, Car seat, EDPS, Baby safety) all signed in chart?
Adhoc: Maternal readiness for discharge → MCHS – D/C – Modify
Contact MD prior to 9pm to discuss plan for night → OB safety huddle (iview Events)
Epidural assessed (iview: reserve dose & pump med verify with two RN)
**Cervidil/Cytotec:** Latent q4h · Active q1h · Temp Intact q4h · Ruptured q2h
**Pitocin VS:** q1h + with each increase · Temp Intact q4h, Ruptured q2h

subcategories.title: Check Times
subcategories.subtitle: Mark off the times you completed checks

items.label: Use the time grid below to log each check.

categories.label: Epidural
categories.description: Before, during & after epidural — hands-on care plus charting

items.label: Grab Anesthesia consent form & cart, bring to room (window side of bed)
Epidural kit and consent / ans record on top of cart
Have pt sit at edge of bed w/ BP cuff and O2 on
BP / O2 / RR q5min during procedure
Assist pt to lay back down in bed
Orders: Tsau, Kang 1 CAMA OB Epidural (level) — most recent
Section 2 — just prior to procedure starting
Scan meds into MAR and sign with anesthesia
Program pump per MD order, have second RN verify setting and witness
PCA / Epidural: chart all that applies
Chart foley catheter — lines and tubes
Then q30min with continuous pulse oximetry
Grab delivery meds / syringe / needle kit
Table in the room / count with tech
Call SL to call MD when ready @ {{blank:time}}
Document in plan labor POCs and then discontinue them

subcategories.title: Fundal Check & VS — q15min x 2hrs
subcategories.subtitle: Then q1h once · q4h to 24hr · q shift to d/c

items.label: Result copy / related records — link baby to mom
Write down the epidural amount administered in the MAR
Removal of epidural + radio tip intact
Catch up on FHT charting & VS

categories.label: Newborn
categories.description: First two hours of life — assessment, meds & documentation

items.label: Give: Hep B, Vit K, erythromycin (refusal form if not)
Check the ANC paper they fill out (checklist + measurements)
Interdisciplinary readiness for D/C: MCHS → discharge workflow → int. Readiness

categories.label: Scheduled C/S
categories.description: Morning prep for scheduled cesarean delivery

items.label: Lights on / FHR straps on bed / plugged in
Bring robe / delivery / orange bags and place in crib → crib in BR
Grab specimen printer for labs / urine
Collect: razor with cartridge, 2nd tape, socks, SCDs, chlorhex wipes, urine sample cup
Place EFM on (off once you have a reactive NST)
Print, sign, scan! Send to lab
Look at lab results: H/H, Plt
Pull OR abx and pitocin → prime meds
Orders: IntraOp, PACU, Postpartum (search provider favorites)
Notification to admitting OB: "admit to inpatient for scheduled C/S"
Confirm H&P in Cerner or pink OB short form (within 24hrs)
Confirm consent matches Cerner order and is witnessed
If tubal: tubal consent printed in chart

categories.label: Emergency C/S
categories.description: For patient already admitted — also reference C/S checklist
categories.infoPanel: **⚡ Time-critical:** Move efficiently. Decision for C/S documented, calls made, prep done in parallel.

items.label: Pull OR abx and pitocin → prime
BP / Pulse Ox / EKG on (pt sitting)
Clean abdomen: 1st sponge stick belly (30 sec over incision area) and then go up to just below chest. 2nd sponge over legs and then down perineum
Turn on ESU (bovii) & suction machine & plug in ESU and suction tubing
Write info on white board (Surgeon, RNFA, Surgical tech, Nursery RN, NRT)
Pour sterile water and sterile NS onto table
Do Counts, sponges, and QBL — look at number right before placenta is delivered and make a note
Universal protocol debrief — specimens, QBL, counts
IntraOp flowsheet (in room time to chart at) → 5 elements + rest
Account for anesthesia meds in MAR
**Soft stuff:** Laps, Sutures, Blades, Bovii, Syringe, CBT, Vacutainer, bulb syringe

categories.label: PACU
categories.infoPanel: **Discharge criteria:** VS stable x15 · O2 sat >92% RA · Patent airway x30min · Alderete score >8 · Two assessments completed

items.label: Anesthesia end @ {{blank:time}} (document times in same column for calculation)
Physician immediate post-op note in Cerner (if not, may not d/c from PACU — call MD)
Place EKG / VS (all) + cont pulse Ox
Print EKG strip and tape to pink piece of paper
**BP / pulse / RR / extremity movement:** q5min x4 → q15min for rest of stay
**Fundal / lochia:** q15min x8 (2hrs), q1h once, q4hrs to 24hr, q shift to d/c
GU color description, foley draining to gravity
Skin color, temp, turgor, incision (skin/wound care MCH)
Document in plan C/S intra-op POC
Document in plan & d/c PACU POC
Binder: top 4 tasks to do (binder checklist / correct documentation)
ADLs: pericare, bed locked, call light within reach, side rails up, alarms on, emergency equip available, ambu bag available, suction equip
Remember: do two assessments before d/c
Check orders → d/c order in, if applicable
POC — document in plan (initiate if needed)
Education (adhoc: Mat readiness for d/c, maternal)
SCDs, Dangle (6-8hrs), Ambulation, Foley (BR independently), pulse ox 24hrs after C/S
Education (adhoc: Mat readiness for d/c, infant / nicu)

subcategories.title: Baby — VS
subcategories.subtitle: At 4hrs, then Q4H x24hrs, then q shift

categories.label: Discharge
categories.description: Mom & baby discharge, documentation & post-d/c tasks

items.label: Discharge order (2 wk f/u EDPS ≥10 & 3-7 day f/u for HTN patients)
EPDS score, check it is charted in iview
Adhoc: Maternal sepsis screen (within 2hrs of d/c)
Follow up appt documented (2 wk for EDPS ≥10 & 3-7 day for HTN)
Discharge teaching (why to call MD / when to go to ED)
Result copy mom info into baby chart
Close pregnancy: MCHS - triage - close pregnancy
Break relationship: 1. Mom click → 2. two people: WH manage fam relation → 3. Click baby, "okay"
Order notification to Admitting OB, discharge date / time
Papers clipped together and placed in medical records bin
TCB / TSB with risk zone (within 4hrs of d/c)
After d/c: Order notification to admitting OB with date / time
i-View: Assessment (click light grey lines to open sections)
Add discharge education (MCHS → discharge workflow → int. Readiness → maternal general)
"Document in plan" for initiated Careplans, or create new POC

categories.label: Reference
categories.description: Cerner shortcuts, order sets, and how-tos

items.name: Print patient stickers:
items.path: pre-reg tab "enter"

items.text: Handheld printer at the nurse station
Checkmark the lab you are drawing
Place label on drawn specimen and write initials, date, time
Click the box to the left of room number to open up that strip
Backtime the start time to when the patient came into the room
Label on the side and top of the white container
Print order: right click → select print
Facesheet and order inside biohazard bag (clear bag w/ red rim) with placenta inside
MCHS → Inpatient summary → order entry / new order → shared → Langlais, Beth → green button

items.name: Triage:
items.path: Langlais, Beth → Favorites → FHMC Triage / Outpatient orders

items.name: Labor admit:
items.path: search for provider favorites

items.name: C/S admit:
items.path: search for provider favorites

items.name: Admit to Obs:
items.path: n/a → keep as triage for up to 24hrs

items.name: Antepartum admission:
items.path: search for provider favorites

items.path: Langlais, Beth → Favorites → FHMC Diabetes: antepartum/postpartum SQ insulin

items.name: Labor SQ insulin:

items.name: Severe maternal sepsis:

items.name: Delivery medication, delivered PTA:
